itemGroup.advanced_clover.name: Advanced Clover
#comment.for_translators_1: `Clover` references to the tribe Trifolieae, which contains three-leaf plants like Medicago, Trifolium, etc.
#comment.for_translators_2: If these specific plants differ in your language, just choose the most common name for these.
#comment.for_translators_4: These lines started with `#comment` does not appear in-game, so you could skip these lines.
advanced_clover.configuration.title: Advanced Clover
config.advanced_clover.working_mode.tool: Working mode of Magic Clover. Accept 'blacklist' or 'whitelist'.
config.advanced_clover.blacklist_items.t: If working mode is 'blacklist', block items with pairing ids. Supports wildcard '*'.
config.advanced_clover.whitelist_items.t: If working mode is 'whitelist', allow items with pairing ids. Supports wildcard '*'.
